mapper.insert: INSERT INTO human_chat_message (message_id, match_id, sender_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{matchId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE human_chat_message SET message_id = #{messageId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM human_chat_message WHERE match_id = #{matchId}
